name: Date Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dates and milk in a bowl.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens, stirring often.
3. Add chopped nuts to the cooked date mixture.
4. Spread the nut-date mixture onto Ritz crackers.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 7 minutes.
6. Allow the cookies to cool completely.
7. Frost the cooled cookies with the icing mix.
Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
